title: Camman18
description: Adds Birch Destroyer Gun, which instantly destroys birch trees, and a rideable Minecart that moves very fast.
body:
1. _**Camman18 Gun**_ – fires a projectile that summons lightning (and destroys one block) on impact (**Only if it hits a birch tree**).

2. _**Auto Minecart**_ – a rideable entity that can move forward and backward at high speed. Can be repaired with iron.
